items.content_html: A plugin for https://obsidian.md, which enables the ability to hide and pin specific files and folders in the file explorer by applying custom filters.

items.content_html: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.
items.title: remotely-save/remotely-save: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.

items.content_html: Query all your data stored in Obsidian, this plugin allows SQL based queries against the data collections available in Obsidian and Dataview. Output can then be rendered by Handlebars
